name: AI Reliability
description: Monitor AI system health: provider availability, error rates, latency, and quality metrics. Track rate limits, error classifications, and response quality signals.

pages.name: Reliability Overview
pages.description: System health, availability, and error rates

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE `error.type` IS NULL) AS 'Success %' FROM AiResponse SINCE 24 hours ago
SELECT count(*) AS 'Error Count' FROM AiResponse WHERE `error.type` IS NOT NULL SINCE 24 hours ago
SELECT percentile(durationMs, 95) AS 'P95 (ms)' FROM AiResponse SINCE 24 hours ago
SELECT average(`ai.quality.score`) AS 'Avg Quality' FROM AiResponse SINCE 24 hours ago
SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE `error.type` IS NULL) FROM AiResponse FACET provider TIMESERIES SINCE 24 hours ago
SELECT percentile(durationMs, 50, 90, 95, 99) FROM AiResponse FACET provider TIMESERIES SINCE 24 hours ago

widgets.title: Error Rate by Provider Over Time

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE `error.type` IS NOT NULL) FROM AiResponse FACET provider TIMESERIES 1 hour SINCE 24 hours ago
SELECT count(*) FROM AiResponse WHERE `error.type` IS NOT NULL FACET `error.type` TIMESERIES 1 hour SINCE 24 hours ago
SELECT timestamp, model, provider, `error.type`, `error.message`, `error.statusCode` FROM AiResponse WHERE `error.type` IS NOT NULL SINCE 1 hour ago LIMIT 20
SELECT rate(count(*), 1 minute) AS 'Requests/min' FROM AiRequest FACET provider TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 1 hour ago

SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE `error.type` IS NULL) AS 'Success %', percentage(count(*), WHERE `error.statusCode` = 429) AS 'Rate Limited %', percentage(count(*), WHERE `error.statusCode` >= 500) AS 'Server Error %' FROM AiResponse FACET provider SINCE 24 hours ago

pages.name: Performance & Quality
pages.description: Latency, quality signals, and performance metrics

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT percentile(durationMs, 50, 90, 95, 99) FROM AiResponse TIMESERIES SINCE 24 hours ago

widgets.title: Time to First Token by Provider

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT average(timeToFirstTokenMs) FROM AiResponse WHERE timeToFirstTokenMs IS NOT NULL FACET provider TIMESERIES SINCE 24 hours ago
SELECT average(tokensPerSecond) FROM AiResponse FACET model TIMESERIES SINCE 24 hours ago
SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE `error.type` IS NOT NULL) FROM AiResponse FACET model TIMESERIES SINCE 24 hours ago

SELECT count(DISTINCT id) AS 'Total', count(DISTINCT id WHERE stopReason = 'max_tokens') AS 'Max Tokens Hit', count(DISTINCT id WHERE `error.type` IS NOT NULL) AS 'Error Anomaly', count(DISTINCT id WHERE `ai.quality.has_latency_anomaly` = 1) AS 'Latency Anomaly' FROM AiResponse TIMESERIES 1 hour SINCE 24 hours ago

SELECT provider, count(*) AS 'Total Requests', percentage(count(*), WHERE `error.type` IS NULL) AS 'Success %', percentile(durationMs, 95) AS 'P95 Latency (ms)', average(tokensPerSecond) AS 'Avg Tokens/sec' FROM AiResponse FACET provider SINCE 24 hours ago
